injuries.comment: The Flyers said that Couturier will likely play for Saturday's (Nov. 1) game versus the Maple Leafs.
The Maple Leafs said that Tanev is expected to play for Saturday's (Nov. 1) game versus the Flyers.
Jarnkrok did not play in Wednesday's (Oct. 29) game against the Blue Jackets.
The Maple Leafs said that Nylander is OUT for Saturday's (Nov. 1) game versus the Flyers.
The Maple Leafs said that Lorentz didn't participate in Friday's (Oct. 31) practice session and is considered day-to-day, per Luke Fox of Sportsnet.
